title: Copilot AI Flow
description: Defines a multi-perspective AI flow discussion with configurable expert roles.

name.description: Display name for the panel discussion.

description.description: Brief description of the panel's purpose. Shown in the library view.

orchestration.description:
How roles interact.

- `sequence`: Sequential execution via the language model API. Roles respond one after another.
- `cli`: SDK/CLI delegation — the panel runs as a background agent via the GitHub Copilot CLI.

category.description: Top-level grouping used in the library view.

difficulty.description: Complexity level of the panel. Shown in the library view.

tags.description: Keywords for searching and filtering in the library.

version.description: Semantic version of this panel definition.

model.description: Panel-level model override. When `orchestration` is `cli` this sets the background agent's model. Individual roles can override with their own `model` field.

tools.description: Global tools available to all roles (sequence mode only). Use `["*"]` to include all available tools.

skills.description: Skills injected into every role's system prompt across the entire panel. Merged with stage-level and role-level skills.

contexts.description: Additional context files injected into every role's system prompt across the entire flow. Use for design guides, architectural principles, security guardrails, coding standards, etc. Merged with stage-level and role-level contexts.

roles.description: Flat list of roles for simple panels. Ignored when `stages` is present. Requires at least 2 roles.

stages.description: Stage-based execution. Stages run sequentially; each stage loops its sub-flow up to `iterations` times. When present, top-level `roles` is ignored.

sharedContext.description: Optional context shared with all roles before the user query. Supports markdown formatting.

isolation.description:
CLI orchestration only. Where changes are applied.

- `workspace`: Applied directly to the active workspace (default).
- `worktree`: Applied in an isolated Git worktree for safe experimentation.

cliMode.description:
CLI orchestration only. Permission and interaction model.

- `supervised`: User approves each tool call interactively (default).
- `autonomous`: Agent executes with minimal confirmation prompts.

customAgent.description: CLI orchestration only. Agent identifier for specialized behaviour.

oneOf.description: Bare skill name — resolved via `vscode.chat.getSkills()`, then `.agents/skills/{name}/SKILL.md`, then `.github/skills/{name}/SKILL.md`.

path.description: Path to a SKILL.md file, relative to this panel file.

oneOf.description: Path to a context file. Resolved first relative to this flow file, then relative to the workspace root. Supports any text format: Markdown, plain text, YAML, etc.

path.description: Path to a context file, relative to this flow file.

oneOf.description: Bare agent name — resolved from `.github/agents/{name}.agent.md` or `.agents/{name}.agent.md`.

path.description: Path to an agent file, relative to this panel file.

name.description: Display name of the role (e.g. `Senior Developer`, `Security Reviewer`).

prompt.description: Instructions defining this role's perspective and responsibilities. Required unless `agent` is set.

agent.description: Agent file whose body becomes (or augments) the system prompt. The body's `$ARGUMENTS` placeholder is substituted with the active user query.

args.description: Static string substituted into `$ARGUMENTS` in the agent/skill body. When absent, the active user query is used.

model.description: Model override for this specific role. Takes precedence over the panel-level `model`.

skills.description: Skills injected into this role's system prompt only. Merged with panel-level and stage-level skills.

contexts.description: Additional context files injected into this role's system prompt only. Merged with flow-level and stage-level contexts. Use for role-specific guidelines or reference material.

name.description: Display name shown in the chat stream as the stage header.

subFlow.description:
Execution pattern for roles within this stage.

- `sequence`: Roles run in order, no iteration semantics.
- `research-edit-review`: Researcher → Editor → Critic. Critic emits `doneWord` to converge early.
- `plan-execute-test-fix`: Planner → Executor → Tester (→ Fixer). Tester emits `doneWord` when passing.

iterations.description: Maximum number of sub-flow repetitions. If `doneWord` is set, the stage exits early when the last role's response contains it; otherwise all iterations always run.

doneWord.description: Convergence sentinel. When the last role's response contains this string the stage exits early, regardless of remaining iterations. If omitted, the stage always runs for the full `iterations` count. Example: `"<!-- flow:done -->"`.

roles.description: Roles that participate in this stage.

skills.description: Skills injected into every role in this stage. Merged with panel-level skills.

contexts.description: Additional context files injected into every role in this stage. Merged with flow-level contexts. Use for stage-specific guidelines or reference material.
